Useful words

  • 矢場 やば · yaba archery range
  • 矢来 やらい · yarai rough fence of bamboo, logs, etc. constructed at battle sites or execution grounds

Example sentences

  • 矢を見ます。I look at the kanji 矢.

Flash Kanji note

What to watch

Learn 矢 through words first, then reinforce it in sentence and stroke-order practice.
